name: Bank Of New Madrid
description_short: Community bank serving Southeast Missouri since 1934, offering residential mortgages, consumer loans, business financing, and savings accounts across New Madrid, Lilbourn, and Portageville.
description_long: Bank of New Madrid was incorporated under Missouri law on August 15, 1934, and has operated as a local community bank for over 90 years. Founded by Sam L. Hunter, Sr., the bank has remained under family leadership, with Sam L. Hunter III currently serving as CEO and Chairman. The institution has evolved from manual operations with five employees to a technology-enabled bank offering modern digital banking solutions while maintaining its community-focused philosophy. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including residential mortgages for home purchases and refinancing, consumer loans for vehicles, boats, and personal needs, business loans with custom solutions, and savings accounts designed for wealth accumulation. Customers can access accounts through online banking platforms and mobile apps available on Apple App Store and Google Play, with features including balance checking, transfers, mobile check deposit, bill payment, and branch locators. Bank of New Madrid distinguishes itself through its explicit positioning as a "real community bank" operating under the motto "Large Enough to Serve You, Strong Enough to Protect You, Small Enough to Know You." The institution emphasizes relationship-based banking rather than transactional banking, with loan officers available to create custom solutions for business clients and mortgage experts for residential lending. The bank maintains physical branches in three Southeast Missouri locations and provides ATM access across their service area. The bank actively publishes consumer education content on topics like money management for youth and online bill payment security, demonstrating commitment to customer financial literacy. However, as a regional community bank, it lacks the digital innovation breadth of larger institutions or neobanks, and service area is geographically limited to Southeast Missouri communities. The website does not provide specific product rates, fee schedules, or detailed loan terms, requiring direct contact for pricing information.
services: Residential mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Consumer loans for vehicles, boats, recreational vehicles, and personal needs
Business loans with custom structuring for profitability optimization
Savings accounts designed for milestone-based wealth accumulation
Online banking platform with account access and transaction management
Mobile banking apps (iOS and Android) with check deposit and bill payment
Consumer loan expert consultation and origination
Financial planning and future-focused savings account options
pros: 90+ year operating history with strong community roots and family leadership continuity since 1934
Mobile banking apps with mobile check deposit, bill pay, and balance management features
Relationship-based lending approach with dedicated mortgage experts and business loan officers
Multiple branch locations in New Madrid, Lilbourn, and Portageville with ATM network
Consumer education content on financial literacy and online security practices
Custom business loan solutions tailored to maximize client profitability
Residential mortgage expertise for first-time buyers, refinancing, and new purchases
cons: Service area limited to Southeast Missouri region only—not available nationally or online
Website lacks transparent pricing, APR ranges, and detailed fee schedules for products
No mention of specific deposit insurance, investment products, or credit card offerings
Limited information on minimum account balances, opening requirements, or product eligibility criteria
No indication of 24/7 customer support—appears to be traditional business hours only
best_for: Southeast Missouri residents seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making
Small business owners and entrepreneurs needing customized commercial lending solutions
Homebuyers in the region working with mortgage specialists for purchase or refinance
diagnosis: Bank of New Madrid is best for Southeast Missouri residents and small business owners who value relationship-based banking and personalized service from a stable, locally-rooted institution. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—this bank only serves New Madrid, Lilbourn, Portageville, and surrounding Southeast Missouri communities, making it inaccessible to customers outside this region.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank serving Southeast Missouri since 1934, offering mortgages, consumer loans, and business financing.
